# Support & community

- **Data corrections / sources:** [Open a data correction issue](https://github.com/dso6060/jem_prototype/issues/new?template=data_correction.yml)
- **Disputes / contested facts:** [Start a Discussion](https://github.com/dso6060/jem_prototype/discussions) — use the *Dispute escalation* template when available
- **Bugs (map or CI):** [Bug report](https://github.com/dso6060/jem_prototype/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- **Maintainers:** [@dso6060](https://github.com/dso6060) — see [`jem/docs/TEAM.md`](../jem/docs/TEAM.md) and [`GOVERNANCE.md`](GOVERNANCE.md). Use GitHub Issues/Discussions; do not post personal contact details in public threads.

This project does not provide legal advice. See the [README disclaimer](../README.md#disclaimer).
